ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cfsa_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landscape_guide_ind_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landscape_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landscape class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the landscape class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landscape class */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the landscape guide indicator group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landscape_classes_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES landscape_guide_ind_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator group */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES landscape_guide_ind_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Area (ha)) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directional_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directional statement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the directional statement */,
  "short_milestone" TEXT /* Short-term milestone (10 years) */,
  "medium_milestone" TEXT /* Medium-term milestone (20 years) */,
  "long_milestone" TEXT /* Long-term milestone (100 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directional_statements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_management_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forest management plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the forest management plan */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the objective category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_management_plans_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_management_plans_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES cfsa_objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest management plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Completion percentage of the plan */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_progress_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES forest_management_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest management plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES forest_management_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the recorded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, researcher, analyst) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest management plan */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES forest_management_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forest management plan being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES forest_management_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new plan, updated data) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
